creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193872
patch

With Bugzilla 5.0 pushing people towards UTF8, this old bug report has finally been resolved.

https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=619847

https://github.com/bugzilla/bugzilla/commit/437d7e21a69a2a377f664d88e932a6f3d59270a3


Unfortunately they didn't fix it until 5.1.2 which we don't have in the ports tree yet, so I've backported the fix.
